title: Cobblemon World
description: With renowned mods such as Create, Distant Horizons and Sophisticated Backpacks, this pack aims to create a cobblemon experience which adds lots of new avenues to explore while creating an immersive cobblemon world!
body:
![The words "Cobblemon World" in a blocky, pixelated font resembling sand and sky, with "World" written below in blue letters with white dots resembling a starry night.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8edd9574009e1b240a47a803d109ab7927c1d333.png)

# What is Cobblemon World?
![A pixelated green character stands on a wooden platform surrounded by bamboo, looking at the moon in a night sky in a Minecraft-style environment.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c2bcd2b1416a41a9bb07002ea56f68e88dffbbb0_0.webp)

**Cobblemon World is a modpack made for friends to enjoy, and to make sure there's something for every playstyle!**

# Who is Cobblemon World for?
![Minecraft stylised Pokemon creature stands on a wooden platform at night under a pixelated moonlit sky.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d0d6412fe624fbc81809859e3704d62f1a871597.png)

### Modpack-savvy players and friends!
**This pack is specifically curated to be easy to configure on servers, so you can play with all your friends!  
[KubeJS](https://kubejs.com/) allows you to easily write JavaScript..scripts..which can change, add, and remove core aspects such as recipes, blocks, mobs and more!**  
  
**LuckPerms also makes it easier to control how players can interact with your server: it's fast, reliable and well documented on their [wiki](https://luckperms.net/)!**
